base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of coin_block_hit — a effect_layer from 1985 super mario bros. Transient mid-hit frame — question-block bumps upward briefly while coin sprite pops out from top. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Transient mid-hit frame — question-block bumps upward briefly while coin sprite pops out from top; single-frame capture of peak-of-bump
